channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: States Weekly: April 22, 2026
item.description: This edition of States Weekly covers April 22, 2026.

item.title: NATO’S Hidden Dividend and the Avoidable Cost of U.S. Withdrawal
item.description: NATO was designed to do more than provide security, it built deep economic integration that has become one of its least appreciated strengths. The economic gains are large, durable, and, in many cases, effectively self-financing relative to the costs of membership.

item.title: The Strait of Hormuz in 8 Charts
item.description: As the standoff over the Strait of Hormuz drags on, new vessel-tracking and trade data reveal the state of play in the strait and explore how the crisis is rattling global markets.
